risks.title: Privileged SSO path bypass risk
risks.description: Privileged operational actions may bypass MFA if SSO policy enforcement drifts.
risks.statement: Legacy operator account cleanup still in progress.

risks.title: Bank callback replay risk
risks.description: Replayed authorization callbacks may produce duplicate or stale decision transitions.
risks.statement: Nonce and idempotency controls sharply reduce replay window impact.

risks.title: Checkout payload spoofing risk
risks.description: Crafted checkout payloads may bypass validation and force unintended authorization paths.
risks.statement: Validation controls are implemented but continuously tuned as payload variants evolve.

risks.title: Manual review decision tampering risk
risks.description: Privileged workflow manipulation may alter manual review outcomes before final decision publication.
risks.statement: Audit coverage is present but needs tighter immutable trail enforcement.
